tasks.title: Replace -1 AI quotas with finite values in plans.config.ts
tasks.description: In `packages/billing/src/config/plans.config.ts`, replace every `-1` AI limit value with the finite values from §6.1: owner-premium → MAX_AI_TEXT_IMPROVE=1000, MAX_AI_CHAT=2000, MAX_AI_SEARCH=2000; complex-premium → MAX_AI_TEXT_IMPROVE=2000, MAX_AI_CHAT=5000, MAX_AI_SEARCH=2000; tourist-vip → MAX_AI_CHAT=1000, MAX_AI_SEARCH=1000. All other plan limits stay unchanged. Test: `packages/billing/test/plans.config.test.ts` — iterate ALL_PLANS and assert no plan has `-1` for any AI limit key (AC-0.1).

tasks.title: Set concrete USD cost ceilings in ai_settings config
tasks.description: In `packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/ai-settings.schema.ts` (or the ai_settings default/config location used by the API), set the concrete ceiling values from §6.3: `globalMonthlyMicroUsd = 100_000_000`; `perFeatureMonthlyMicroUsd = { chat: 45_000_000, search: 30_000_000, text_improve: 15_000_000, support: 10_000_000 }`. Verify the existing `AiCostCeilingsSchema` accepts these exact integer values. Test: unit test in `packages/schemas/test/` asserting exact ceiling values parse without error and the integers are in µUSD units (AC-0.2).

tasks.title: Implement resolveOwnerLimitsForOwnerId in owner-entitlement.ts
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/middlewares/owner-entitlement.ts`, add the function `resolveOwnerLimitsForOwnerId(ownerId: string): Promise<Map<LimitKey, number>>` per §7.2. Mirror `resolveOwnerEntitlementsForOwnerId`: resolve ownerId → billing customer → active subscription → plan limits JSONB + customer-level limit overrides via `billing.subscriptions.getByCustomerId`, `billing.plans.get`, `billing.limits.getByCustomerId`. Falls back to owner-basico DB row limits when no active sub. Cache consistent with 5-min entitlement cache. Test file: `apps/api/test/unit/middlewares/owner-entitlement.test.ts` — assert: (1) owner with active sub → correct limits map; (2) owner with no sub → owner-basico fallback limits returned; (3) customer-level override merges correctly (AC-1.1).

subtasks.title: Implement ownerId → billing customer → plan limits resolution chain
Implement owner-basico fallback when no active subscription
Apply customer-level limit overrides
Write unit tests: active sub, no-sub fallback, override merge (AC-1.1)

tasks.title: Define Model C field-split table as exhaustive TypeScript constant
tasks.description: In `packages/billing/src/config/model-c-field-split.ts` (new file), define a typed exhaustive record classifying every seed-controlled `billing_plans` column as `'capability'` or `'commercial'` per §8.2. Entries: `entitlements` → capability; `limits` presence → capability; `limits` values → commercial; `metadata.monthlyPriceArs` / `annualPriceArs` → commercial; `active` → commercial; `description` → commercial; `metadata.displayName` → commercial; `metadata.isDefault`, `metadata.category`, `sortOrder`, trial fields → capability. Export from `@repo/billing`. Test: `packages/billing/test/model-c-field-split.test.ts` — assert every column listed in §8.2 is classified and no unclassified column exists (AC-2.3).

subtasks.title: Create model-c-field-split.ts with typed field-split record
Classify all §8.2 columns
Export from @repo/billing barrel
Write guard test: all classified, no unclassified (AC-2.3)

tasks.title: Inline owner-scoped gate, quota check, and metering in chat route handler
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/chat.ts`, replace the tourist-keyed `createAiQuotaMiddleware('chat')` gate with inline owner-scoped logic per §7.3: (1) resolve `ownerId` from `accommodation.ownerId` (already fetched as 404 guard); (2) call `resolveOwnerEntitlementsForOwnerId` + `resolveOwnerLimitsForOwnerId`; (3) gate: owner lacks `AI_CHAT` → 403 `ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED` (use the i18n key from T-006); (4) quota: `getMonthlyCallCount({ userId: ownerId, feature: 'chat', now })` >= ownerLimit → 403 `LIMIT_REACHED`; (5) `recordAiUsage({ userId: ownerId, ... })`. Keep `createAiRateLimitMiddlewares('chat')` untouched. Test: `apps/api/test/integration/ai/chat-owner-metered.test.ts` — AC-1.2 (success, recordAiUsage called with ownerId) + AC-1.3 (owner-at-quota → 403 LIMIT_REACHED) + AC-1.5 (rate-limit preserved).

subtasks.title: Remove createAiQuotaMiddleware('chat') from chat route
Add owner entitlement + limit resolution inline
Add owner quota check (getMonthlyCallCount keyed by ownerId)
Wire recordAiUsage keyed by ownerId (not tourist userId)
Write integration tests AC-1.2, AC-1.3, AC-1.5

tasks.title: Update billingPlans.seed.ts capability-layer sync policy
tasks.description: In `packages/seed/src/required/billingPlans.seed.ts`, replace the current warn-only-on-divergence behaviour with the Model C per-field policy per §7.5: capability-layer divergence → sync DB to config (overwrite); commercial-layer divergence → leave DB as-is (log for visibility only). Reference the field-split table from T-008. Add a guard: every seed-controlled column must be classified in the field-split table before the seed runs (fail-fast on unclassified column). Test: `packages/seed/test/billing-plans-seed.test.ts` — assert capability sync updates DB, commercial mismatch leaves DB unchanged (AC-2.2 seed side, AC-2.3 guard).

subtasks.title: Import field-split table from @repo/billing
Capability divergence: overwrite DB column from config
Commercial divergence: log and skip (do not overwrite)
Guard: fail-fast if a seed-controlled column is unclassified
Write seed tests for capability-sync and commercial-no-clobber

tasks.title: Write idempotent Model C extras migration (finite limits + capability removals)
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/src/migrations/extras/014-model-c-capability-sync.sql` (or the next available extras number). The migration must: (1) update four AI limit keys on plans that had -1 to config values from §6.1; (2) remove AI_CHAT + MAX_AI_CHAT_PER_MONTH from tourist plan rows; (3) remove AI_SEARCH + MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH from all plan rows; (4) run the general capability sync governed by §8.2 field-split; (5) support a dry-run mode (param or env); (6) call clearEntitlementCache for touched customers or document the 5-min window acceptance. Must be idempotent: second run reports zero changes. Test: real-DB integration test in `packages/db/test/extras/014-model-c-sync.test.ts` covering AC-0.3, AC-0.4, AC-1.4, AC-2.1, AC-2.2, AC-3.1.

subtasks.title: Write SQL for finite-limit propagation (4 AI limit keys, -1 rows)
Write SQL for AI_CHAT removal from tourist rows
Write SQL for AI_SEARCH removal from all rows
Write SQL for general capability sync (entitlements array + limit key presence)
Add dry-run mode and idempotency guard

tasks.title: Write real-DB integration tests for Model C extras migration
tasks.description: Create `packages/db/test/extras/014-model-c-sync.test.ts` using `testDb.setup/clean`. Scenarios (against a db:fresh-dev snapshot): (1) AC-0.3 — seed -1 limits manually, run migration, assert finite values + AI_CHAT removed from tourist rows + AI_SEARCH removed from all rows + commercial fields byte-identical; (2) AC-0.4 — run migration twice, assert second run reports zero changes (idempotent); (3) AC-2.1 — add a new EntitlementKey to a plan in config, run migration, assert DB row gains it; (4) AC-2.2 — operator-edit a limits value, run migration, assert value NOT overwritten. Uses the 13 SPEC-143 test users seeded via db:fresh-dev.

tasks.title: Refactor search route to drop quota gate and require auth
tasks.description: In `apps/api/src/routes/ai/...search...` (locate the search route file), remove `createAiQuotaMiddleware('search')` entirely. Add auth-required guard: unauthenticated requests get a login-prompt response (not a 403 AI gate). Keep: per-user/IP rate-limit via `createAiRateLimitMiddlewares('search')`, the `ai_settings` per-feature USD ceiling (`perFeatureMonthlyMicroUsd.search`) enforced by the engine ceiling checker, and metering via `recordAiUsage` for cost visibility. The AI_SEARCH EntitlementKey and MAX_AI_SEARCH_PER_MONTH LimitKey entries are NOT removed from enums. Test: `apps/api/test/integration/ai/search-platform.test.ts` — AC-3.2 (authenticated user with no AI entitlements → 200), AC-3.3 (ceiling-hit → 503 CEILING_HIT). Anonymous → login-prompt response.

Confirm rate-limit and USD ceiling remain active

Write AC-3.3 test: ceiling-hit → 503 CEILING_HIT

tasks.title: Update packages/billing/CLAUDE.md with Model C two-layer model
tasks.description: In `packages/billing/CLAUDE.md`, add a 'Model C — Two-Layer Config/DB Split' section documenting: (1) the capability layer (config wins, auto-propagated on deploy via db:apply-extras); (2) the commercial layer (DB wins, operator-editable via SPEC-168 admin UI); (3) the §8.2 field-split table; (4) how to add a new entitlement (update plans.config.ts + re-run extras migration). Cross-reference the `adding-an-entitlement.md` doc. Also update `docs/billing/adding-an-entitlement.md` with the same Model C context and a note that config-only changes require running the extras migration to propagate (R-6 mitigation).
